flags.message: Forward-mode disclosure: the prediction rests decisively on public companion-case signal predating the snapshot - the 2026-04-20 cert grant in Beaird v. United States (No. 25-5343) on the same Stinson/Kisor question, which makes this petition a likely hold. Legitimate forward signal, not leakage; no query sought this case's own disposition (still pending as of the 2026-07-17 snapshot).
